violations.text: Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the condenser fan guards in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Fan guards must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

Ambient temperature of the prep unit lowboy was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods in this unit observed with temperatures 43 - 44 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods were moved to properly functioning units. Service call placed during inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in this unit until it is serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the slide cold hold unit observed in poor repair, split away from the door. Gasket is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

Refrigerator door gasket of the prep unit observed in poor repair. Gasket is to be replaced. In addition, rust observed above the blade and wheel of the can opener. Can opener/parts must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
